posts.raw_content:
At this point, I hardly even give a shit about how accurate the panicans' predictions are. That's not the problem I have with these people. 

The problem is not how correct they are with their doomsday predictions. The actual problem is that these people are absolutely useless at helping their fellow Americans and make themselves unattractive/unengaging with how pathetically low energy they are.

They don't do ANYTHING to help you or I. They don't show any intentions of wanting to stop the evil in our country and by extension the world. They don't provide any solutions to our problems, they don't encourage or call for action in any sense, they don't do a damn thing to help. Instead, all they do is encourage their fellow Americans to just embrace the suck and wallow in misery.

And they wonder why people don't like hearing what they have to say.

It doesn't even end there. I genuinely feel like at least some of the panicans don't have good intentions and/or don't actually give a shit about America. They often act arrogant and condescending when their doomsday predictions turn out to be true, and they seem to care more about being right all the time than they care about the lives of their fellow Americans. Truth be told, I think many panicans actually WANT the Democrats to win both 2026 and 2028 so they can then stoke their egos about their doomsday predictions being correct and can snarkily say shit like "Hah, I told you so!!!!" and if they actually cared about America they wouldn't be acting that way.

A lot of these people are more aligned with Nick Fuentes than they'd care to admit. Sorry, but I'll take people like Scott Presler and Jake Lang more seriously than I do Fuentes, at least those two guys are example of people who are actually going out there and trying to do shit, and encourage their fellow Americans to never give up.
